title: Task 2 Launch - 4 Compartments
description: Launch of task 2 under the topic 4 Compartments. Participants must thoroughly review task documents, watch the briefing video, and follow presentation submission guidelines.

description: Detailed session to discuss task 2 and how to complete it effectively.

description: Study and discussion of five divine names with their meanings and significance.

description: 1-hour discussion on mental health as foundational for spiritual and professional success. Part of bi-weekly series on holistic growth.

title: Qissa e Adam o Iblis - Ramadan Series
description: Session on the story of Adam and Iblis during Ramadan series.

title: Preparation for Upcoming Session - Raheeq ul Makhtum
description: Preparation guidance for TLs (Team Leaders) to read pages 219-230 from Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum (The Sealed Nectar) before the session.

title: Isra and Miraj - Geopolitical and Landscape Analysis
description: Seerah session analyzing the geopolitical context and landscape of the Isra and Miraj event.

description: Thursday IMS session exploring the neuroscience principles within Surah Ad-Duha, presented by Mian Fahad.

title: The Prophetic Identity - Ep2 - X-ray of our Life
description: Wednesday IMS session on the prophetic identity and its implications for our lives, presented by Muhammad Asadullah.

title: Seerah Session - Pages 273-283
description: Saturday Seerah session from Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum pages 273-283, presented by Ghaziyan C22 G11.

title: Qur'an Study Circle - Friday Class
description: Weekly Qur'an study circle focusing on translation, root words, grammar, and tafseer with shared reflections. Every Friday at 9:00 PM.

title: 4 Compartments Presentation
description: Group presentation on the 4 Compartments topic, presented by Asma Asad.

title: Digital Addiction Crisis Among Youth
description: Presentation discussing the crisis of digital addiction among young people, its impacts, and potential solutions.

title: جہیز کی حیثیت اسلام میں (Status of Dowry in Islam)
description: Presentation exploring the Islamic perspective on dowry (Jehaiz) and its religious significance.

description: Presentation on strategies to revive and promote reading culture in Pakistan.

title: Untangling Nikkah
description: Presentation providing clarity on Islamic marriage (Nikkah) principles and practices.

title: Navigating Career Clarity
description: Presentation on achieving clarity in career choices and professional development.

title: Anatomy of Islamic Decline
description: Presentation analyzing the factors and causes of decline in Islamic civilization.

description: Presentation on developing psychological strength and mental health through studying the prophetic life.

title: Loss of Reading Culture in Pakistan
description: Analysis of declining reading habits in Pakistan and strategies for revival.

title: Decline of Intellectual Culture in Muslim Societies
description: Examination of the decline in intellectual and scholarly traditions in Muslim societies.

title: Translating Golden Age Classics for the Islamic World
description: Discussion on translating classical Islamic texts for contemporary audiences.

title: Duniya ke Rishte aur Aakhirat ka Rishta (Worldly Relationships and Hereafter)
description: Exploring the relationship between worldly connections and spiritual accountability.

title: Mastering the Mind
description: Comprehensive presentation on mastering and controlling the mind for personal growth.

title: Marriage Preparation Crisis in Pakistani Youth
description: Analysis of challenges young Pakistanis face in preparing for marriage in modern times.

title: IMS Introductory Session
description: Comprehensive introduction to IMS mission, vision, structure, and ongoing tasks.

title: Bi-Weekly Holistic Growth Series
description: Bi-weekly series focused on holistic growth covering mental health, Seerah, and global context understanding.
